prompt: Dry-run only: prepare a GitHub PR for the current dotfiles repository changes. Assume the prompt supplied Jira ticket OB-2468. You are currently on main with one local commit and no working-tree changes. Explain the exact repository-aware plan, proposed branch, title, body shape, checks, and reviewer decision, but do not mutate git, Jira, GitHub, or the filesystem.
assertions: The response preserves dry-run safety and does not claim to create a ticket, branch, push, reviewer request, or PR.
The response verifies or proposes verifying the GitHub default branch instead of assuming main solely from its name.
The proposed head branch is exactly OB-2468 because the starting branch is the default branch.
The proposed PR title follows the exact form '[OB-2468] short description of changes'.
The response identifies repository-specific validation and commit conventions from the current dotfiles repository.
The response does not invent a PR template or reviewer and explains that neither is evidenced in this repository.
